title: product_constraints
description: Hard bounds on variables (min/max/threshold/enum). Used for input validation and BOM engine safety checks. 'applies_when_json' can conditionally scope a constraint (e.g. only when system_type='XPL').

constraint_type.description: min/max = numeric bound; enum = allowed value list (as JSON array string); threshold = trigger value.

value_text.description: Constraint value as text. For numeric: '300'. For enum: '[65,90]' or '["in_ground","base_plate"]'.

severity.description: error = blocks BOM generation; warning = surfaces to user; info = advisory only.

applies_when_json.description: Conditional predicate. Empty object = always applies. Example: {"system_type":"XPL"}.

message.description: Message shown when this constraint fails. Should be staff/customer-readable.
